validated_objective: Introduce an AOF CLI context-efficiency layer with command taxonomy, command registry metadata, and AI recognition-packet integration for major command paths.
scope: Define canonical command categories for the current CLI surface.
Add a command registry artifact consumable by humans and AI.
Expose top commands and runtime flow through the AI recognition packet.
Keep the long CLI reference as detailed backup, not the only discovery surface.
constraints: Do not weaken Discovery or Need Validation authority boundaries.
Do not break existing command semantics.
Preserve backend-neutrality and current verification surfaces.
expected_outcomes: Operators can find the right class of command faster.
AI sessions can select major commands with lower context cost.
The CLI surface gains a canonical routing layer that future automation can reuse.
